name: findSectionsByHeading
description: Finds heading-based sections in a Google Document and reports heading ranges plus the first table that follows each heading.

documentId.description: The document ID — the long string between /d/ and /edit in a Google Docs URL.

headings.description: List of exact heading texts to locate in the document.

tabId.description: The ID of the specific tab to inspect. If not specified, inspects the first tab or legacy document body.
